# Capture Data Engineering Lessons

This is a process skill, not an execution workflow skill.

Use it manually after a bug fix, incident, or repeated friction point to record:
- problem
- root cause
- fix
- prevention
- tags

Primary output target:
- `tasks/lessons.md`

This skill is intentionally manual-only because it is better used as a deliberate reflection step than as an automatically triggered capability.
